architectureDecision.label: Parallel conditional jobs
architectureDecision.rationale: Each matched check group runs as its own job with classifier if:; ci-result aggregates pass/fail/skipped.

readyReview.decision: Mixed paths run union of matching groups as parallel conditional jobs; ci-result aggregates.

technicalBreakdown: Wire classifier outputs to per-group job if: conditions in ci.yml.
Add check-code, check-docs, check-governance, check-extension jobs as needed per path class.
Ensure ci-result treats intentional skips as success after phase-1 proof.
Validate evidence/status-only runs only changes + ci-result.

acceptanceCriteria: Code changes run build, code checks, tests, smoke, and extension when shared surfaces require it.
Docs/governance and extension-only paths run only relevant groups (union when multiple classes match).
Each matched group runs as a separate conditional job; ci-result reports aggregate outcome.
Evidence/status-only changes produce only classifier and ci-result.
